name: Charm
description: A felt charm. The uneven stitches are cute.
quote: Even if it doesn't look that well-made, it really works.

name: Cookie
condition: Ask what food Saeko likes during a conversation on the first night.
description: A gingerbread cookie in the shape of a human. The sugary smile makes you hungry.

name: Camera
condition: Explore Saeko's past memories during a conversation on the second night.
description: An instant camera with undeveloped film. Even if the subject is gone, the memories remain.
quote: It was hard getting the camera to focus.

name: Knit Cap
condition: Find the third choice during a conversation on the third night.
description: An off-white knit cap. Even you recognize the brand logo.
quote: I knew it'd look good even without you trying it on.

name: Jewelry Box
description: A jewelry box that can open and close. The location changes a little every time you go out.
quote: I almost never find anything good to buy.

name: Jewelry Box
description: A jewelry box that can open and close. The location changes a little every time you go out.
quote: I almost never find anything good to buy.

name: Figurine
condition: Talk about monster movies during a conversation on the fourth or fifth night.
description: A figurine in the shape of a monster. The horn expresses its desire to destroy.
quote: Rin, why are your eyes sparkling so much?

name: Sunglasses
condition: Try to flirt with Saeko during a conversation on the fourth or fifth night.
description: Designer sunglasses. They are a must-have for any flashy guy.
quote: What do you think? They'd look good on me too, right?

name: Concealer
condition: Show interest in makeup during a conversation on the fourth or fifth night.
description: A concealer for hiding skin imperfections. The face becomes a canvas for art.
quote: Like I thought, little people have no need for this.

name: Seashell
description: A conch shell from the seashore. Put your ear close, and you can hear the sound of the ocean.
quote: The sound is your breathing being echoed back at you.

name: Broken Seashell
description: A conch shell broken at the seashore. You used to be able to hear the sound of the ocean.

name: Hand Mirror
description: A hand mirror for looking at yourself. Saeko and you, Rin, can be seen in it now.
quote: Yes, this is you and me.

name: Hand Mirror
description: A hand mirror for looking at yourself. Only Saeko's body can be seen in it now.

name: Hand Mirror
description: A hand mirror for looking at yourself. Nothing is reflected in its shattered surface.
quote: I no longer care what other people think.
